rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ELSABET T. JONES IRREVOCABLE DECEMBER 13, 2011 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Petitioner And Co-Trustee Barbera Brooks Subpoena For Business Records To Pfp Holding Company Ii, Llc Dba Prime Finance And Request For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: The hearing on Respondent's Motion to Quash is stayed until January 25, 2017. Respondent must submit a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on October 26, 2016.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ELSABET T. JONES IRREVOCABLE TRUST II DTD 5/27/99 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Petitioner And Co-Trustee Barbera Brooks Subpoena For Business Records To Pfp Holding Company, Ii, Llc Dba Prime Finance And Request For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: The hearing on Respondent's Motion to Quash is stayed until January 25, 2017. Respondent must submit a proposed order. Anyone choosing to contest the tentative must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on October 26, 2016.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE JAMES JOHNSON, SR REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Attorney Chaune Williams Representation Of Dushawn Johnson In This Action
rulings.Rulings: Respondent Jeanell Johnson's Motion to Disqualify Attorney Chaune Williams is denied. Chaune Williams's declaration under penalty of perjury sufficiently rebuts the declarations filed by Respondent absent additional documentary evidence to the contrary. The prevailing party must submit a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on 10/26/2016.
